analysis.name: IoTeX
analysis.summary: IOTX近期无重大利好，24小时涨幅28%但7日跌幅11%，价格仍处低位。基本面为DePIN+AI概念，但曾遭黑客攻击，市场情绪偏弱。建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 若出现新的基本面恶化或黑客事件，则逻辑失效

catalysts: 项目方曾承诺回购和流动性计划（2025年10月）

latestNews.title: IoTeX Bridge Hacked for $8.8M via Private Key Exploit, IOTX Price Dips
latestNews.reason: 黑客事件损害项目信誉，导致价格下跌

latestNews.title: IoTeX commits to 100% compensation plan in hack recovery plan
latestNews.reason: 补偿计划有助于恢复信任，但执行效果待观察

latestNews.title: IoTeX Plans Token Buybacks, Liquidity Boost Programs Following Binance IOTX Price Anomaly
latestNews.reason: 回购和流动性计划可能支撑价格

fundamentals: IoTeX是专注于物联网和AI的区块链平台，与Google、Samsung等合作
总供应量100亿，流通94.4亿，接近全流通
市值约2836万美元，排名667，属于小市值项目
历史最高价0.2556美元，当前价格0.003美元，跌幅超98%
marketRead: 24小时涨幅28%，但7日跌幅11%，30日跌幅32%，短期反弹但中期趋势仍弱
成交量253万美元，相对市值较小，流动性一般
Binance数据不可用，可能受地域限制影响
risks: 曾遭黑客攻击损失880万美元，安全风险高
价格长期低迷，市场信心不足
小市值项目波动大，流动性风险
新闻多为旧闻，缺乏近期催化
watchlist: 是否有新的合作伙伴或技术进展
sourceNotes: Binance数据因地域限制无法获取，价格数据来自CoinGecko
新闻时效性较差，多为2025-2026年初

profile.name: IoTeX
profile.description: IoTeX is the blockchain platform for Real-World AI. Since 2017, its foundational infrastructure has delivered verified, real-time data from the real world to AI systems and decentralized applications. Powering 100+ projects and 40M devices across mobility, robotics, energy, health, and more, IoTeX enables developers to build next-gen AI models and applications that deliver real-world impact. The IoTeX tech stack provides the data, identity, and verification layers to fulfill the surging demand for real-world data in the new AI era. Trusted by partners like Google, Samsung, IEEE, ARM, and Nordic Semiconductor, IoTeX is uniquely positioned to capture the multi-trillion-dollar AI and data economy.
